name: karpathy-kb
description: Maintain a personal Obsidian knowledge base with a Karpathy-style LLM-maintained wiki workflow, backed by the standalone source-reader MCP server.

interface.longDescription: Maintain a personal Obsidian knowledge base using raw notes and confirmed wiki publishing; source reading is delegated to the standalone source-reader MCP server.
defaultPrompt: 读取这个链接并给我预览
沉淀这份资料到知识库
发布最近一篇 raw 到 wiki
